description_long: This is a military-style helmet with a camouflage fabric cover, featuring a mix of green, brown, and tan splotches typical of modern urban or woodland patterns. The helmet has a rounded dome shape with a slightly flared brim and visible fabric seams running along the surface. On one side, a set of rifle cartridges is tucked into the helmet band, adding a utilitarian detail. The opposite side displays handwritten text reading 'BORN TO FLEX' in black marker, giving the helmet a personalized touch. The chin straps are visible and hang loosely from the sides, indicating a standard retention system. The overall appearance suggests durability and functionality, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A rounded military helmet with camouflage fabric, visible chin straps, rifle cartridges on one side, and 'BORN TO FLEX' text on the other.
description_view_0: Front view showing the camouflage pattern, helmet dome, and chin straps hanging down.
description_view_1: Side view with 'BORN TO FLEX' text clearly visible on the helmet's surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous camouflage pattern and the helmet's rounded shape.
description_view_3: Side view featuring several rifle cartridges tucked into the helmet band.
attribute_graphic_design: Camouflage pattern with handwritten 'BORN TO FLEX' text and rifle cartridges on the band.
